title: T-052 — UI: TEC-062 Routing Cost Preview + TEC-063 Resource Utilization Preview
prompt: Build routing cost preview card (TEC-062) and resource utilization Gantt-lite (TEC-063) per §12.4. Match `bom_cost_panel` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:154-206 (cost) and `work_centers_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:37-71 (resource). Uses T-023 cost endpoint + reads production_lines/machines from 02-SETTINGS. RED tests/ui/tec-062-063-routing-preview.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-062-063-routing-preview.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Routing cost summary + lightweight resource utilization preview.
pipeline_inputs.details: Cost preview reads ?volume from input. Gantt-lite uses simple horizontal bar layout.
acceptance_criteria: Given the preview card renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:154-206 and design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:37-71, then card layout, total-row formatting, and resource bars match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given volume input changes, when typed, then totals re-render within 200ms.
Given no operations, when rendered, then empty-state copy appears.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + volume reactivity.
risk_red_lines: Do not call cost-preview API on every keystroke without debounce.
